title: Shared loading with server authority
prompt:
Show the Garry's Mod Lua loading shape for myaddon/shared.lua so clients receive it and both realms include it, while an ApplyDamage action remains server-authoritative and checks the player before damaging an entity.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: server AddCSLuaFile, shared include, server-only authoritative mutation
